content:
Oh right one thing come to mind is Herbert dialogue with William in 7-13 (I think)

He wrongly called William loop ramona, because the CN text was like “环行•拉蒙娜对吧？” Herbert wasn't referring to William in this moment, but the translation became "You are loop ramona, right?"

This created some confusions for newer players
玩了半年的表示需要刷2-3小时
